text:
Created attachment 166109
sysutils/debootstrap 1.0.75 -> 1.0.76

Please update sysutils/debootstrap to 1.0.76. Changes:

debootstrap (1.0.76) unstable; urgency=medium

  [ Marco d'Itri ]
  * Stop creating useless device nodes (Closes: #571136).
